title: SocCraft
description: SocCraft is an experience of building socialism on minecraft server
body:
SocCraft is a technical modpack that satirically refers to the realities of life in the Eastern Bloc.

The pack is primarily intended to be played on the official server.

Main features:
- technology based on Tech Reborn and AE 2 mods
- no Create (this is an alternative for people who feel nostalgic for older tech modpacks)
- social inequality (mid-game armor is locked, food quality affects available health points)
- cigarettes
- beautiful world with Regions Unexplored
- swords have been replaced by firearms, combat rebalance
- low hardware requirements
